title: John Smith Legacy Models Addon
description: An addon to the John Smith Legacy resourcepack that provides a range of refined models.
body:
I've been playing on John Smith resourcepack since early beta versions of Minecraft and I'm really glad that it's still being continued. As of the introduction of custom models to Minecraft in 2016, I decided to make a contribution to this excellent pack. The results of that is this addon, which I decided to share with you and keep alive since then seeing the awesome feedback from all of you. I do not post content updates often anymore, but I will try to provide service updates for new Minecraft versions. Feel free to post suggestions and critique, or bother me if I haven't updated the pack. Feedback is always appreciated.


![Pack gif](https://media.giphy.com/media/5qjLdgHYxhacW5wpAG/giphy.gif)
  
![Pack gif](https://media.giphy.com/media/AVRA9bjxDzrEr9qu0k/giphy.gif)



**Warning**! This addon is meant for use with the regular John Smith Legacy pack, which is required for the pack to work correctly! Furthermore, JimStoneCraft edition is not supported.
